zh.Wedmore, Somerset, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特維德莫
zh.Richmond, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾里士滿
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Wycliffe Esq.於1465年出生在英國達勒姆威克里夫時，他的父親Robert Wycliffe29歲，母親Margery Conyers23歲。他於1484年與Anne Bowes在英國達勒姆達勒姆結婚。他們至少是6個女兒的父母。他去世於1535年11月10日在他的家鄉享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Wycliffe Esq.于1465年出生在英国達勒姆威克里夫时，他的父亲Robert Wycliffe29岁，母亲Margery Conyers23岁。他于1484年与Anne Bowes在英国達勒姆達勒姆结婚。他们至少是6个女儿的父母。他去世于1535年11月10日在他的家乡享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wycliffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Wycliffe (NR Yorks).

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Wycliffe Esq. was born in 1465, in Wycliffe, Durham, England, his father, Robert Wycliffe, was 29 and his mother, Margery Conyers, was 23. He married Anne Bowes in 1484, in Durham, Durham, England. They were the parents of at least 6 daughters. He died on 10 November 1535, in his hometown, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Wycliffe Esq. est né en 1465, à Wycliffe, Durham, Angleterre, son père, Robert Wycliffe, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margery Conyers, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Anne Bowes en 1484, à Durham, Durham, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 filles. Il est décédé le 10 novembre 1535, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Wycliffe Esq. 1465 in Wycliffe, Durham, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Wycliffe 29 und seine Mutter Margery Conyers 23. Er hat 1484 in Durham, Durham, England Anne Bowes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Töchter. Er starb am 10. November 1535 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Wycliffe Esq. è nato il nel 1465 nel Wycliffe, Durham, England, il suo padre, Robert Wycliffe, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Margery Conyers, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Anne Bowes nel 1484, nel Durham, Durham, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figlie. Morì il 10 novembre 1535, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Wycliffe Esq.が1465年にイギリスダルハムウイクリフで生まれた時，父Robert Wycliffeは29歳，母Margery Conyersは23歳であった。1484年にイギリスダルハムダルハムでAnne Bowesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の娘の親であった。彼は1535年11月10日に故郷で70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Wycliffe Esq.(이)가 1465년 영국 뒤람 윈이클리프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Wycliffe(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Conyers(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1484년 영국 뒤람 뒤람에서 Anne Bowes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1535년 11월 10일 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Wycliffe Esq. nasceu em 1465, em Wycliffe, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Wycliffe, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Margery Conyers, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Bowes em 1484, em Durham, Durham, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de novembro de 1535, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Wycliffe Esq. родился в 1465 г. в местности виклифф, дурам, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Wycliffe было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Conyers, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Bowes в 1484 г. в местности дурам, дурам, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 дочерей. Он умер 10 ноября 1535 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph Wycliffe Esq. nació en 1465, en Wycliffe, Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Wycliffe, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Margery Conyers, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Anne Bowes en 1484, en Durham, Durham, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijas. Murió el 10 de noviembre de 1535, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años.
